name: Authentication & Session Management
current_phase: 4 auth fixes applied (Session 474): cold-start race, skip stub, joinCompany refresh, SEC-8 recovery persistence. BLOCKER-17 open: clearLocalCompanyData never called on sign-out. Remaining: secure_password_change, BLOCKER-17.
description: Supabase auth with email/password sign-in, sign-up, password reset, deep linking, and session management
constraints_summary: Cache tokens in encrypted secure storage (NOT SharedPreferences)
Session atomicity: sign-in success = token + user stored together
No sign-in attempts without network (graceful offline message)
Clear tokens on sign-out regardless of network state
Password recovery flag must be persisted (SharedPreferences) to survive app kill
Profile must be loaded before router evaluates — set isLoadingProfile=true synchronously in constructor
